title: Golden Apple Tree
description: Add a tree which can grow golden apple.
body: Golden Apple Tree(Fabric) requires Fabric Loader, Fabric API. Golden Apple Tree(Forge) requires Minecraft Forge or Neoforge. #### Discord Link: https://discord.gg/pDaMyHDfBy #### This mod add two apple tree, it can help you grow golden apple and enchanted golden apple. #### Sapling Recipe ![recipe1](https://s2.loli.net/2025/02/03/wSWadC1FpbNUYln.jpg) ![recipe2](https://s2.loli.net/2025/02/03/YAPQu9SH3Ltabrn.jpg) ![appletree.png](https://s2.loli.net/2025/07/16/GI2woQnFTCcNLX4.png) ## Growth of the Golden Apple Tree The growth of the Golden Apple Tree is divided into three stages. During the first two stages, no visible changes occur. In the third stage, the fruit matures, and you can harvest it by right-clicking on the ripe fruit. For the detailed information, please read the minute contents below. THANKS!!!
